confirm_force_delete: This will permanently delete the user and all their data.
create_user_desc: Create a new account with the default quota and new-user default policy group.
invite_user_desc: Send a registration invitation to an email address. Existing pending invitations for that address will be replaced.
user_invitations_intro: Manage user invitations, copy registration links, or revoke invitations that are still pending.
confirm_revoke_invitation: Revoke the pending invitation for {{email}}? The existing link will stop working.
no_invitations_desc: No user invitations have been created yet.
user_search_placeholder: Search by username, email, or ID...
no_filtered_users_desc: Try another keyword or adjust the filters.
storage_quota_settings_desc: Adjust the user's role, status, total quota, and policy group binding here.
security_actions_desc: Keep high-risk controls here, including forced password changes, password resets, and forced sign-out.
force_password_change_desc: Require this user to change their password after their next successful sign-in. Existing sessions are revoked when this setting is saved.
admin_reset_password_desc: Set a new local sign-in password for this user without requiring their current password.
reset_password_hint: The new password must be 8-128 characters long.
revoke_sessions_desc: Invalidate this user's current access and refresh tokens across devices.
revoke_sessions_hint: Use this to force a fresh sign-in after a security event, account status change, or administrator intervention.
reset_mfa_desc: Clear this user's authenticator, recovery codes, and pending MFA login flows.
reset_mfa_hint: Use this when the user lost their authenticator or recovery codes. Existing sessions are revoked as part of the reset.
password_confirm_mismatch: The confirmation password does not match.
user_details_footer_hint: Changes are saved to the system immediately. Proceed carefully.
initial_admin_delete_blocked: The initial admin account cannot be deleted.
initial_admin_status_blocked: The initial admin account cannot be disabled.
initial_admin_email_verification_blocked: The initial admin account email verification state cannot be changed.
initial_admin_role_blocked: The initial admin account cannot be demoted.
